description: You are a perioperative medicine researcher building a surgical workflow database. Using Vital Recorder and the three recordings (0001.vital, 0002.vital, and 0003.vital) in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\, extract and structure the complete event timeline into a comprehensive database at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\event_timeline_db.txt. The recordings contain event markers such as 'Case started' and 'Surgery finished'. The database must be in a tabular format with columns for Case_ID, Event_Name, Time_from_Start_min, and perioperative Phase (pre-operative, intraoperative, or post-operative). Additionally, export each case's full vital signs data to case_0001_events.csv, case_0002_events.csv, and case_0003_events.csv on the Desktop. Login: Windows Desktop user (no Vital Recorder login required).
